title: stachys recta subsp. serpentini
intro: Stachys recta subsp. serpentini, commonly known as hedge nettle, is a plant species within the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of hedge nettle include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues. Hedge nettle can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
